<?php namespace Knuckles\Scribe\Extracting\Strategies\UrlParameters; use Knuckles\Scribe\Attributes\UrlParam; use Knuckles\Scribe\Extracting\Strategies\GetParamsFromAttributeStrategy; /** * @extends GetParamsFromAttributeStrategy<UrlParam> */ class GetFromUrlParamAttribute extends GetParamsFromAttributeStrategy { protected static array $attributeNames = [UrlParam::class]; }
